problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
